violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Observed employee putting on gloves without washing hands.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Boxes of Lettuce stored on floor in Walk In cooler.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Container lids, Togo boxes stored on floor.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
